---
description: "Seed pedagogical content for a specific subject and level in ScienceLycée"
agent: "Orchestrateur"
argument-hint: "Subject and level: 'maths terminale', 'physique seconde', 'chimie première', etc."
---
Generate or update the seed management command for the specified subject and level.

Available combinations:
- Mathématiques: seconde, première, terminale
- Physique: seconde, première, terminale
- Chimie: seconde, première, terminale

The Orchestrateur will delegate to the appropriate seed agent (seed-maths-terminale, seed-physique-seconde, etc.).
